## Lab Idea

**Title:** (e.g., "Function Calling vs Tool Use in OpenAI API")

**Level:** L50 / L100 / L200 / L300 / L400

**Learning Path:** Copilot / Foundry / MCP / SK / RAG / Agent Builder Teams / Agent Builder VS Code / Pro Code / All

**Estimated time:** (e.g., ~30 min)

## What Would Learners Do?

Describe the hands-on exercise in 2-3 sentences.

## Why is this important?

What gap does this fill? Who would benefit most?

## Cost requirements

- [ ] Completely free (no account needed)
- [ ] Free GitHub account only
- [ ] Azure free tier
- [ ] Paid Azure subscription needed

- [ ] No, just suggesting
